deliverable_text:
January 21, 2026
Hi Wes,
Enclosed is the information regarding your Michigan Tax Registration Application. We have registered your business online for Sales Tax Registration with the Michigan Department of Treasury. Please note the information below for your records and future use.
Confirmation Number: 1-296-509-464
Action Items:
You can sign up to file, pay and manage your business tax account online at:https://mto.treasury.michigan.gov/eai/mtologin/authenticate?URL=/
Now that your registration is complete, you can begin collecting tax from your customers. If you use AvaTax to calculate taxes, follow the instructions to "Tell Us Where You Collect Tax"
If Avalara will file returns on your behalf, follow the instructions to "Schedule Your Returns" to activate this service.
Please note:
You can return to the Michigan e-Registration website in 2-3 business days to check the status of your application. You can access Michigan e-Registration website at:https://miwam.unemployment.state.mi.us/mip/ereg/_/ . Please be advised that the Michigan Sales Tax Registration is done through the Michigan Unemployment Portal and does not indicate an Unemployment Tax account Registration.
